features.name: FIFO with small depth and zero read latency
features.description: Code should include a FIFO module instantiation with depth=2 and rd_latency=0 parameters

features.name: Concurrent push and pop pointer updates in always_ff
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block where read and write pointers update based on non-empty and non-full conditions respectively, causing both to advance when FIFO has one element

features.name: Circular buffer with decrement wrap-around addressing
features.description: Code should include a circular buffer memory where read/write addresses use subtraction wrap-around instead of proper modulo increment for wrap-around

features.name: FIFO count-based condition for pointer advancement
features.description: Code should include pointer update conditions derived from fifo_count that evaluate non-empty and non-full status rather than explicit push/pop enable signals
